title: EOG Resources 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for EOG's business description, commodity exposure, reserves discussion, and oil and gas operating profile.

title: EOG Resources Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization and public-company ranking reference for the registry snapshot.

title: EOG Resources P/E Ratio
note: Trailing P/E ratio reference used for valuation input metrics.

title: Distributed Energy Resource Management Systems
note: Documents DERMS capabilities, distributed energy aggregation, community microgrid control, and grid-edge flexibility mechanisms.

title: OpenEMS
note: Open-source energy management system reference for decentralized energy control alternatives.

title: Calliope
note: Open-source energy system modelling tool used as a planning alternative for gas-demand displacement scenarios.

title: OSE Open Hardware Standard
note: Open hardware and distributed production framework relevant to speculative local energy-transition manufacturing concepts.
